# Consina

> Consina is an Indonesian outdoor lifestyle brand, founded in Jakarta in 1999, designing and selling gear for hikers, campers, climbers, and trail runners across the archipelago.

Consina designs and sells outdoor equipment built and tested for Indonesia's tropical, volcanic, and high-altitude terrain. Products include backpack carriers (35L–100L), tents and shelters (1P–6P+), technical apparel, hiking footwear, and outdoor accessories. The brand operates more than 80 retail stores across Indonesia and runs a "Responsible Trekker" community focused on leaving trails better than they were found.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://consina-website.lovable.app/): Brand overview, featured products, community, and store locator
- [Carriers](https://consina-website.lovable.app/carriers): Hiking backpacks and carriers from 35L to 100L
- [Tents & Shelter](https://consina-website.lovable.app/tents): Tents from solo bivvies to 6+ person expedition shelters
- [Apparel](https://consina-website.lovable.app/apparel): Jackets, pants, shirts, and base layers for the trail
- [Footwear](https://consina-website.lovable.app/footwear): Hiking boots, trail runners, and trekking sandals
- [Accessories](https://consina-website.lovable.app/accessories): Bottles, headlamps, navigation, cooking, and safety gear
- [Store Locator](https://consina-website.lovable.app/stores): 80+ Consina retail locations across Indonesia

## Key facts

- Founded: 1999 in Jakarta, Indonesia
- Categories: Carriers, Tents & Shelter, Apparel, Footwear, Accessories
- Retail footprint: 80+ stores across Indonesia (Jakarta, West/Central/East Java, Bali, Sumatra, Kalimantan, Sulawesi, Eastern Indonesia)
- Community: "Responsible Trekker" — environmental stewardship for outdoor adventurers
- Contact: hello@consina.com
